# terrible_kaytus_ksmanage_add_ldisk (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `accelerator` (Number) Driver accelerator, 1 - 1h, 2 - 2h, 3 - 3h. Required when controller type is PMC.
- `access` (Number) Access Policy, 1 - Read Write, 2 - Read Only, 3 - Blocked. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `cache` (Number) Drive Cache, 1 - Unchanged, 2 - Enabled, 3 - Disabled. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `ctrl_id` (Number) Raid controller ID. Required when controller type is LSI, PMC or MV.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `init` (Number) Init State, 1 - No Init, 2 - Quick Init, 3 - Full Init. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `io` (Number) IO Policy, 1 - Direct IO, 2 - Cached IO. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `level` (Number) RAID Level, 0 - RAID0, 1 - RAID1, 5 - RAID5, 6 - RAID6, 10 - RAID10. Required when and controller type is LSI or PMC.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `r` (Number) Read Policy, 1 - Read Ahead, 2 - No Read Ahead. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `select` (Number) Select Size, from 1 to 100. Required when controller type is LSI.
- `size` (Number) Strip Size, 0 - 32k, 1 - 64k, 2 - 128k, 3 - 256k, 4 - 512k, 5 - 1024k. Required when *Info=None* and controller type is LSI, PMC or MV. When the controller type is MV, size is [0, 1]. When the controller type is LSI or PMC, size is [1, 2, 3, 4, 5].
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `slot` (String) Slot Num, input multiple slotNumber like 0, 1, 2.... Required when controller type is LSI or PMC.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vname` (String) Virtual drive name. Required when controller type is PMC or server model is M7. Required when controller type is MV.
- `w` (Number) Write Policy, 1 - Write Through, 2 - Write Back, 3 - Write caching ok if bad BBU. Required when controller type is LSI.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `message` (String) Messages returned after module execution.
- `state` (String) Status after module execution.
